message:
refactor(i18n): migrate middleware.ts to proxy.ts for Next.js 16

Next.js 16 deprecates middleware.ts in favor of proxy.ts. This migration:

- Renames the intl middleware from middleware.ts to proxy.ts
- Changes exported function from middleware() to proxy()
- Adds documentation explaining the Next.js 16 change
- Removes old middleware.ts file

The functionality remains identical - locale detection, routing, and
cookie persistence for internationalization.

See AGENTS.md "Next.js 16 Middleware Deprecation" for context.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
